title: Create instructor Reports page with payment tracking
description: I need help implementing the Reports page for individual instructors in Drive CRM. Requirements: Review the wireframe design, update the page at instructors/{id}?tab=reports, display tabulated data showing all payments received and pending payments, implement filtering capability to toggle between paid and pending payment views, update top-level summary cards to reflect totals based on the active filter. For version one: keep it simple with clean tabulated data.
